JOURNEY.TITLE: Your Journey
JOURNEY.ROADMAP_SUB: Each phase is roughly 5 lessons. You progress as you go.
JOURNEY.RECOMMENDED_TITLE: Practice for what we worked on
JOURNEY.RECOMMENDED_SUB: Hand-picked materials matched to the things you struggled with most.
JOURNEY.PREMIUM_TEASER_TITLE: Get an AI coach on top of your journey
JOURNEY.PREMIUM_TEASER_BODY: Premium adds an AI coach that rewrites your plan and next-lesson focus after every lesson — and removes the wait if you ever want to change your goal.
JOURNEY.PREMIUM_TEASER_SUB: AI rewrites your plan after every lesson. No goal-change cooldown.
JOURNEY.EMPTY_TITLE: Your journey starts with a goal
JOURNEY.EMPTY_BODY: Tell us why you're learning and we'll build a personalized roadmap of phases — designed for the way you actually want to use the language.
JOURNEY.EMPTY_PREVIEW_EYEBROW: What your journey will look like
JOURNEY.EMPTY_PREVIEW_P1: Find your footing in real conversations
JOURNEY.EMPTY_PREVIEW_P2: Handle daily life situations with ease
JOURNEY.EMPTY_PREVIEW_FOOT: Your real plan will be tailored to your goal.

CEFR.AGREEMENT_HIGH_LONG: Your AI and tutor assessments line up — you're consistently at this level.
CEFR.AGREEMENT_MEDIUM_LONG: Most of your recent lessons point to this level, with some normal variation.
CEFR.AGREEMENT_LOW_LONG: Your recent lessons span a wider range. Take a few more lessons for a sharper estimate.
CEFR.PROFILE_NOT_YET_TITLE: We'll estimate your level after a few lessons
CEFR.PROFILE_NOT_YET_BODY: After 5 completed lessons (or your first chapter graduation), we'll surface a clear, evidence-based CEFR estimate here. Tutor assessments are weighted alongside AI signals.
CEFR.DIVERGENCE_TITLE: Your tutors and the AI don't quite agree
CEFR.DIVERGENCE_BODY: AI signals point to {{aiLevel}}; your tutors lean toward {{tutorLevel}}. Take a few more lessons — the picture usually sharpens.

JOURNEY.COMING_UP_SUB: Your next lessons and what each tutor plans to focus on.
JOURNEY.COMING_UP_NO_FOCUS: Your tutor will set a focus before the lesson.

INTRO.S1_BODY: We've turned your goal into a step-by-step journey, so every lesson moves you forward in a direction that actually matters to you.
INTRO.S2_BODY: After each lesson we look at how you did and gently update your next focus — so your plan keeps pace with your real progress, not a generic curriculum.
INTRO.S3_BODY: Edit any phase to make it yours, reorder what's coming, or change your goal anytime. The roadmap is here to serve you, not the other way around.
INTRO.EDIT_SUB: Adjust the phase names or descriptions to better reflect your own goals.

EDIT.FIELD_FOCUS_PLACEHOLDER:
e.g.
Ordering at restaurants
Small talk with neighbors
Asking for directions
EDIT.SAVE_FAILED: We couldn't save those changes. Please try again.
EDIT.AI_PROMPT_BODY: Tell the AI what you'd like to change. You have {{count}} regenerations left this month.
EDIT.AI_FAILED: AI couldn't refresh the plan right now. Please try again later.
EDIT.AI_LIMIT_REACHED: AI rewrite limit reached for this month
EDIT.AI_LIMIT_REACHED_LONG: You've used all of your AI rewrites for this 30-day window. You can still edit each phase directly. Your AI rewrites will reset soon.
EDIT.AI_LOCKED_FREE: AI rewrites are a Premium feature
EDIT.AI_LOCKED_FREE_LONG: Premium adds an AI coach that can rewrite your full plan whenever you want a different direction. You can still edit each phase directly on Free.

CHAPTER_COMPLETE.BODY_GRADUATED: You've graduated to the next chapter. New backdrop, new phases, new focus — all tuned to where you are now.
CHAPTER_COMPLETE.BODY_DEMOTED: We noticed your last few lessons were tougher than usual. Let's spend a little more time at this level so the next one feels effortless.
CHAPTER_COMPLETE.BODY_MASTERY: You've reached C2 — the highest chapter. From here it's about staying sharp with weekly challenges and real-world practice.
CHAPTER_COMPLETE.BODY_PROMOTED: Your first lessons told us you're already past this level. Welcome to your new chapter — we'll keep tuning as we go.
CHAPTER_COMPLETE.LIVE_TOAST_GRADUATED: Chapter complete — your new map is ready

JOURNEY.DECAY_WARNING_TOAST: Last few lessons were tough — your tutor will help next time.
JOURNEY.HUMAN_INTERVENTION_TOAST: Things have been bumpy. Want to chat with a tutor about your plan?
JOURNEY.PHASE_SPLIT_TOAST: Your tutor noticed this phase is harder than expected. We've split it in two — same total length, more time to master it.

PROGRESSION.MODAL_BODY_1: You'll move to the next phase when your recent lessons feel consistently solid. We look at your last few lessons together — grammar, fluency, the way you handle the conversation — to gauge when you're ready. Your tutor's read on this matters too.
PROGRESSION.MODAL_BODY_2: There's no exam, no score to chase, and no fixed number of lessons. Some phases click after a handful of lessons; others take a little longer.
PROGRESSION.MODAL_FOOTNOTE: You'll never be stuck. If you've been working on the same phase for a while, we'll move you forward to keep things fresh — even if there's still ground to cover.

SPLIT.NODE_TOOLTIP: We split this phase to give you more time on it.
SPLIT.CARD_BODY: We split this phase in two so you have more time to master it. The total lesson budget is unchanged.
SPLIT.MODAL_BODY_1: When the system notices a phase is harder than expected — usually because mastery hasn't reached the threshold after several lessons — we split it into two smaller sub-phases.
SPLIT.MODAL_BODY_2: You don't lose any progress. The total number of lessons stays the same. You just get a clearer focus area at a time, instead of trying to absorb everything at once.
SPLIT.MODAL_FOOTNOTE: Splits only happen for premium plans, and only once per phase.

RECOVERY.NODE_TOOLTIP: A consolidation phase before stepping back up.
RECOVERY.CARD_BODY: Quick consolidation here. We're locking in what you already know before stepping you back up — no pressure, just steady reps.

PAST_MAPS.TITLE: Past maps
PAST_MAPS.EMPTY_TITLE: Your past maps will live here
PAST_MAPS.EMPTY_BODY: Once you complete your first chapter, you'll be able to revisit it here.

PLAN_HISTORY.TITLE: Plan history
PLAN_HISTORY.EMPTY: Nothing to show yet — your plan's timeline will appear after your first lesson.

MASTERY.TITLE: You've reached C2
MASTERY.BODY: There are no more chapters to climb. Each week, your tutor brings you a fresh micro-challenge to keep your edge sharp.
MASTERY.EMPTY: Your first weekly challenge is on its way — check back soon.
MASTERY.STARTED_TOAST: Starting {{theme}} — your tutor will see your results.

CHAT.TITLE: Edit your plan
CHAT.EMPTY_TITLE: Tell me how to tweak your plan
CHAT.EMPTY_BODY: I'll suggest changes to your current chapter — you decide whether to apply them. Try "add more speaking practice" or "focus more on past tense".
CHAT.ERROR_GENERIC: Couldn't reach AI right now. Try again in a moment.
CHAT.ERROR_APPLY: Couldn't apply your edits. Your plan was not changed.
CHAT.CONFIRM_BODY: You have {{remaining}} AI edit left this month. Once used, you'll need to wait until the oldest edit expires.

UPGRADE.TITLE: Plan
UPGRADE.AI_OFF_BANNER_TITLE: AI analysis is off — you're not getting most of Premium
UPGRADE.AI_OFF_BANNER_BODY: Your plan won't auto-update after lessons and your focus suggestions will be generic. Turn AI back on to use what you're paying for.
UPGRADE.AI_ON_FAILED: Couldn't enable AI right now. Please try again.
UPGRADE.HERO_SUB: Premium turns each lesson into an AI-coached plan update — your roadmap stays personal as you grow.
UPGRADE.PREMIUM_PERK_2: AI rewrites your plan after every lesson
UPGRADE.PREMIUM_PERK_3: Personalized next-lesson focus, written for you
UPGRADE.PREMIUM_PERK_4: No cooldown when changing your goal
UPGRADE.CHECKOUT_ERROR: Could not start checkout. Try again in a moment.
UPGRADE.PORTAL_ERROR: Could not open the portal. Try again in a moment.

SOFT_PLAN_PROMPT.TITLE_PAUSED: Ready to pick your plan back up?
SOFT_PLAN_PROMPT.BODY_UNFRAMED_FREE: You've taken a few lessons at your own pace. A short roadmap can sharpen each session — same lessons, with a clearer next step.
SOFT_PLAN_PROMPT.BODY_UNFRAMED_PREMIUM: Premium is doing its job — but a roadmap helps the AI tune each lesson to where you're going next.
SOFT_PLAN_PROMPT.BODY_PAUSED_FREE: You've kept showing up. Resuming your plan picks up right where you left off.
SOFT_PLAN_PROMPT.BODY_PAUSED_PREMIUM: Resuming brings back your phases and tutor focus — premium analysis keeps running either way.

WELCOME_SCREEN.SUBTITLE: Live language tutoring with a phased roadmap tied to your goal—plus practice between lessons so each session builds on the last.
WELCOME_SCREEN.TUTOR_SUBTITLE: Teach live lessons where learners follow a guided roadmap, book you in-app, and get structured follow-up between sessions. Let's finish your tutor profile.
WELCOME_SCREEN.TRUST_FREE: No credit card needed to sign up
WELCOME_SCREEN.FEAT1_DESC: Progress through phases matched to your goal so you always know the next milestone.
WELCOME_SCREEN.FEAT2_DESC: HD video lessons from any device, with tools built for real-time language teaching.
WELCOME_SCREEN.FEAT3_DESC: Practice picks up where your lesson left off—so pronunciation, fluency, and focus stay on track.
WELCOME_SCREEN.TUTOR_FEAT1_DESC: Learners move through goal-based phases; your sessions help them advance with clear intent.
WELCOME_SCREEN.TUTOR_FEAT2_DESC: Run focused video lessons with in-app tools designed for language instruction.
WELCOME_SCREEN.TUTOR_FEAT3_DESC: Students get follow-up practice and recap so your teaching carries through the week.

WELCOME_SCREEN.HOW_STEP3: Learn live and build habits between sessions

STUDENT.PACING_SUGGESTION_BODY_UNFRAMED: You have {{weeks}} weeks to your target — staying on focused single lessons is often the faster path. You can always come back and add a roadmap.

PROFILE.TITLE: Profile
PROFILE.AI_OFF_WARN_BODY: AI analysis powers most of your Premium features — your plan auto-updates after each lesson, smarter focus suggestions, and AI-rewritten roadmaps. Without it, you'll keep your tutor and lessons but lose the AI-driven personalization you're paying for. You can turn it back on anytime.

TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TITLE: New Trial Lesson Scheduled
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.INTRO: A new student has booked a trial lesson with you.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.PREPARATION_INTRO: This is your first session together, so it's a great opportunity to make a strong impression. Here are a few suggestions to help you prepare:
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TIP_1_SUFFIX: to understand their level, goals, and interests.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TIP_2: Arrive a few minutes early—you can join the lesson directly from your Home Page or the Lessons tab.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TIP_3: Prepare a short introduction activity to help break the ice and understand their speaking ability.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TIP_4: Ask about their objectives and preferred learning style; this will help guide future lessons.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TIP_5: Be welcoming and supportive—trial sessions often determine whether the student will continue with you.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.SUPPORT_TEXT: If you have any questions, feel free to contact support at any time.

NOTIFICATIONS.TITLE: Notifications
NOTIFICATIONS.EMPTY_DEFAULT: Stay tuned! We'll let you know when there's something new.

MSG.LESSON_CREATED_TUTOR: {{studentName}} set up a {{language}} lesson with you for {{date}} at {{time}}
MSG.LESSON_CREATED_STUDENT: You set up a {{language}} lesson with {{tutorName}} for {{date}} at {{time}}
MSG.LESSON_CREATED_STUDENT_TRIAL: You set up a {{language}} trial lesson with {{tutorName}} for {{date}} at {{time}}
MSG.LESSON_CREATED_TRIAL_TIPS: {{studentName}} booked a trial lesson on {{date}} at {{time}}. Check your messages for preparation tips.
MSG.LESSON_CANCELLED_AUTO: Your session scheduled for {{date}} at {{time}} has been cancelled. You have not been charged.
MSG.RESCHEDULE_PROPOSED: {{proposerName}} proposed a new time for your lesson for {{date}} at {{time}}
MSG.RESCHEDULE_ACCEPTED: Your reschedule proposal has been accepted.

MSG.CLASS_AUTO_CANCELLED_STUDENT: The class "{{className}}" with {{tutorName}} scheduled for {{date}} at {{time}} has been cancelled due to insufficient enrollment. You have not been charged.
MSG.CLASS_INVITATION_CANCELLED: The class "{{className}}" with {{tutorName}} scheduled for {{date}} at {{time}} has been cancelled due to insufficient enrollment.

MSG.PAYMENT_EARNED: You earned ${{amount}} for your lesson with {{studentName}} on {{date}}. Funds will be available for withdrawal shortly.
MSG.PAYMENT_PAYPAL: Your payout of ${{amount}} for the lesson on {{date}} has been sent to your PayPal account ({{email}})
MSG.PAYMENT_AVAILABLE: ${{amount}} from {{count}} {{lessonText}} is now available for withdrawal.
MSG.LESSON_REFUNDED: Your lesson with {{tutorName}} has been refunded to your wallet.
MSG.PAYMENT_CANCELLED: Payment for your lesson with {{studentName}} has been cancelled due to investigation findings.
MSG.PARTIAL_REFUND: A partial refund of ${{amount}} has been issued for your lesson with {{tutorName}}.
MSG.PAYMENT_REDUCED: Payment for your lesson with {{studentName}} has been adjusted to ${{amount}} due to investigation findings.
MSG.INVESTIGATION_RESOLVED: The reported issue for your lesson with {{studentName}} has been resolved in your favor. Payment will be released.
MSG.DISPUTE_SUBMITTED: {{tutorName}} has disputed the payment cancellation for their lesson with {{studentName}}.
MSG.TIP_RECEIVED_WITH_FEE: You received a ${{netAmount}} tip from {{studentName}} for your lesson on {{date}}. (${{grossAmount}} tip − ${{fee}} processing fee)
MSG.TIP_RECEIVED: You received a ${{amount}} tip from {{studentName}} for your lesson on {{date}}.
MSG.TIP_SENT: You sent a ${{amount}} tip to {{tutorName}} for your lesson on {{date}}.
MSG.VIDEO_APPROVED_FIRST: Your introduction video has been approved. You can now start tutoring! Your profile will now be discoverable to students. Be sure to add your availability!
MSG.VIDEO_APPROVED: Your introduction video has been approved.
MSG.VIDEO_REJECTED: Your introduction video needs changes. Please review the feedback and resubmit.
MSG.FEEDBACK_REQUIRED: Your lesson with {{studentName}} just ended — leave your feedback while it's fresh!
MSG.FEEDBACK_REMINDER: Your lesson with {{studentName}} has ended. Leave feedback for your student!
MSG.PROGRESS_MILESTONE_FIRST: You've unlocked your Progress Profile after 5 {{language}} lessons! Tap to see your full breakdown.

MSG.CREDENTIAL_REJECTED: Your credential needs review. Please check the details.

MSG.OFFICE_HOURS_STARTING: Your office hours session is starting soon.

PROFILE_SCREEN.INTRO_VIDEO_SUBTITLE: Help students get to know you better
PROFILE_SCREEN.INTRO_VIDEO_DESC: Upload a short video introducing yourself and explaining your teaching style. This video will be shown to students when they're browsing tutors.

TUTOR_APPROVAL.STEP_PHOTO_DESC: Add a professional photo so students can recognize you
TUTOR_APPROVAL.STEP_VIDEO_DESC: Create a short video introducing yourself and your teaching style
TUTOR_APPROVAL.STEP_CREDENTIALS_DESC: Verify your identity and teaching qualifications
TUTOR_APPROVAL.STEP_IDENTITY_DESC: Upload a government-issued ID so we can confirm who you are
TUTOR_APPROVAL.STEP_IDENTITY_STRIPE_SKIPPED: Stripe will verify your identity during payout setup — no extra upload needed.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.STEP_QUALIFICATIONS_DESC: Upload teaching certifications and any supporting documents
TUTOR_APPROVAL.METHOD_REASON_STRIPE_COUNTRY: Stripe Connect is available in {{country}} — you'll receive fast, automatic payouts.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.METHOD_REASON_PAYPAL_COUNTRY: Stripe Connect isn't available in {{country}} yet, so we'll route your payouts through PayPal.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.STEP_PAYMENT_DESC: Set up payments to receive earnings
TUTOR_APPROVAL.STEP_TOS_DESC: Review and accept the terms of service
TUTOR_APPROVAL.PHOTO_GOOGLE_WARNING: This is your Google account photo. Please upload a professional profile photo for approval.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.PHOTO_INFO_1_DESC: Clear, well-lit photo of your face
TUTOR_APPROVAL.PHOTO_INFO_2_DESC: Students are more likely to book
TUTOR_APPROVAL.PHOTO_INFO_3_DESC: Must be a recent photo of you
TUTOR_APPROVAL.PHOTO_SETTINGS_NOTE: You can change your photo later in the settings but it must always be a professional photo
TUTOR_APPROVAL.GOV_ID_SUBTITLE: Passport, driver's license, or national ID card
TUTOR_APPROVAL.CRED_CERT_NAME_PLACEHOLDER: e.g., TEFL, CELTA, Bachelor's in Education
TUTOR_APPROVAL.CRED_INFO_SECURE_DESC: Documents are encrypted and only visible to our review team
TUTOR_APPROVAL.CRED_INFO_REQUIRED_DESC: Government ID and at least one teaching certification are required
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TAX_SUBTITLE: We need this to comply with tax regulations and set up your payouts correctly.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TAX_US_Q: Are you a US person for tax purposes?
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TAX_US_HELP: A "US person" includes US citizens, permanent residents (green card holders), and residents who meet the substantial presence test.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TAX_US_YES_LABEL: Yes, I am a US person
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TAX_US_YES_NOTE: I will receive a 1099 tax form
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TAX_US_NO_LABEL: No, I am not a US person
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TAX_US_NO_NOTE: I will provide a W-8BEN form
TUTOR_APPROVAL.BANK_SUBTITLE: This helps us determine the best payout method for you.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.BANK_US_Q: Do you have a US bank account?
TUTOR_APPROVAL.BANK_US_HELP: A US bank account allows for faster, lower-fee payouts via Stripe.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.BANK_YES_LABEL: Yes, I have a US bank account
TUTOR_APPROVAL.BANK_NO_LABEL: No, I don't have a US bank account
TUTOR_APPROVAL.METHOD_REASON_STRIPE: As a US person with a US bank account, Stripe Connect provides the fastest payouts.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.METHOD_REASON_PAYPAL_US: As a US person without a US bank account, PayPal is your best option for receiving payments.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.METHOD_REASON_PAYPAL_INTL: As an international tutor, PayPal provides reliable worldwide payouts.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.PAYPAL_LINK_NOTE: Make sure this email is linked to your PayPal account
TUTOR_APPROVAL.INFO_PAYOUT_FAST_DESC: Earnings go straight to the bank account you verify in Stripe.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.ERR_PAYPAL_EMAIL_INVALID: Please enter a valid email address
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_IC_INTRO: By using Barnabi as a tutor, you agree to the following terms. Please read each clause carefully before accepting.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_CLAUSE_1_BODY: You are an independent contractor, not an employee of Barnabi. You are responsible for your own taxes, insurance, and business expenses. Barnabi does not withhold taxes on your behalf.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_CLAUSE_2_BODY: You are solely responsible for reporting and paying all applicable taxes in your country of residence. US Persons may receive a 1099-NEC; non-US Persons may be asked to provide a W-8BEN form.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_CLAUSE_3_BODY: You agree to provide high-quality, professional instruction. You will not engage in harassment, discrimination, or any conduct that violates our community guidelines. Barnabi reserves the right to remove tutors who violate these standards.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_CLAUSE_4_BODY: You retain ownership of your original teaching materials. By uploading content to Barnabi, you grant us a non-exclusive license to display and distribute it within the platform for the purpose of delivering your services.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_CLAUSE_5_BODY: Earnings are paid out weekly via your selected payout method. Barnabi retains a platform fee from each transaction. Cancellation and refund policies apply as outlined in our tutor policies.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_CLAUSE_6_BODY: Either party may terminate this agreement at any time. Upon termination, any outstanding earnings will be paid out according to the standard schedule. Your content will be removed from the platform within 30 days.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_CHECKBOX_LABEL: I have read and agree to the Independent Contractor Agreement, Terms of Service, and Privacy Policy.

CREATE_MATERIAL.LIBRARY_EMPTY_DESC: Build video quizzes, reading passages, or listening exercises for your students
CREATE_MATERIAL.CREATE_NEW_DESC: Add a quiz, reading, or listening exercise
CREATE_MATERIAL.BUNDLE_INTRO_BODY: A bundle groups your materials (videos, readings, listening exercises) into a structured learning pack. Students can purchase or access the entire bundle at once — great for themed content like "Travel Spanish" or "Business English Basics".
CREATE_MATERIAL.BUNDLE_FIELD_TITLE_PH: e.g. Spanish for Travel - Complete Pack
CREATE_MATERIAL.BUNDLE_FIELD_TITLE_TIP: Choose something descriptive — students browse by title first.
CREATE_MATERIAL.BUNDLE_FIELD_DESC_PH: What will students learn from this bundle?
CREATE_MATERIAL.BUNDLE_MATERIALS_EMPTY: No materials available. Create some materials first.
CREATE_MATERIAL.BUNDLE_MATERIALS_EMPTY_BODY: Create and publish materials from the “What would you like to create?” step. When you’re ready, return here and select at least two for this bundle.
CREATE_MATERIAL.BUNDLE_MATERIALS_FOOTTIP: Students who get the bundle unlock all materials inside it, regardless of individual pricing.
CREATE_MATERIAL.BUNDLE_WIZ_TITLE_D: Choose a clear title so students know what this learning pack includes.
CREATE_MATERIAL.BUNDLE_WIZ_DESC_D: Explain what students will learn or practice across the materials in this bundle.
CREATE_MATERIAL.BUNDLE_WIZ_MATERIALS_D: Choose at least two published materials. Students who access the bundle unlock all of them.
CREATE_MATERIAL.BUNDLE_WIZ_COVER_D: A strong cover helps your bundle stand out in browse and search.
CREATE_MATERIAL.BUNDLE_WIZ_LANG_D: Set the teaching language and difficulty so the right students find this bundle.
CREATE_MATERIAL.BUNDLE_WIZ_TAGS_D: Add tags so students can discover this bundle when they search.
CREATE_MATERIAL.BUNDLE_WIZ_SHARE_H: How would you like to share this bundle?
CREATE_MATERIAL.BUNDLE_WIZ_SHARE_D: Choose whether students access this bundle for free or pay once to unlock it.
CREATE_MATERIAL.BUNDLE_WIZ_PRICE_D: Price the whole bundle — often less than the sum of individual paid materials.
CREATE_MATERIAL.BUNDLE_WIZ_PRICE_TIP: Tip: Price below the total of individual materials so the bundle feels like a clear deal.
CREATE_MATERIAL.BUNDLE_WIZ_TOAST_MATERIALS: Select at least one material for your bundle.
CREATE_MATERIAL.BUNDLE_WIZ_TOAST_MATERIALS_MIN_TWO: Select at least two materials for your bundle.
CREATE_MATERIAL.PUBLISH_BANNER_DESC: Share this link with your students or in your video description
CREATE_MATERIAL.CHANNEL_DESC: Linking your channels helps verify content ownership and auto-approves your paid materials.
CREATE_MATERIAL.CARD_VIDEO_UNAVAILABLE: Video unavailable — update your link to avoid refunds
CREATE_MATERIAL.TYPE_TITLE: What would you like to create?
CREATE_MATERIAL.TYPE_VIDEO_QUIZ_DESC: Link a YouTube or Vimeo video and create comprehension questions
CREATE_MATERIAL.TYPE_VIDEO_QUIZ_LOCKED: Link your YouTube or Vimeo account first to create video quizzes
CREATE_MATERIAL.TYPE_READING_DESC: Write a text passage and create questions to test understanding
CREATE_MATERIAL.TYPE_LISTENING_DESC: Link audio from SoundCloud, Spotify, or upload a direct file (.mp3, .wav) and add questions
CREATE_MATERIAL.PRICING_TITLE: How would you like to share this?
CREATE_MATERIAL.POLICY_DESC_1: When students pay for a video quiz, they expect the video to remain available. If the video is removed from YouTube or Vimeo after a purchase, affected students will be automatically refunded and the refund will be deducted from your earnings.
CREATE_MATERIAL.POLICY_DESC_2: Please ensure your videos remain accessible for at least 90 days after any student purchase.
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_VIDEO_DESC: Add your video and describe what students will learn
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_READING_DESC: Write the passage and describe what students will learn
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_LISTENING_DESC: Add your audio source and describe what students will learn
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_TITLE_D: Add a catchy, meaningful title so students know what they'll work on.
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_DESCRIPTION_D: Explain what students will learn or practice — a sentence or two is enough.
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_WHY_D: Optional: a short pitch visible to students on your card. Helps them decide to enroll.
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_LANG_D: Choose the teaching language and the difficulty that best fits this material.
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_TAGS_D: Pick tags so students can find this material when they search or browse topics.
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_TOPICS_D: Optional: add free-text keywords that aren't covered by the tags above.
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_THUMBNAIL_D_VIDEO: A strong cover helps your material stand out. You'll crop to the card shape (16:10).
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_THUMBNAIL_D_READING: Add a cover image — required for reading materials. You'll crop to the card shape (16:10).
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_THUMBNAIL_D_LISTENING: Add a cover image — required for listening materials. You'll crop to the card shape (16:10).
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_VIDEO_D: Paste a YouTube or Vimeo URL. We'll load a preview once the link is valid.
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_PASSAGE_D: Write or paste the text students will read. You can format headings and lists below.
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_AUDIO_D: Link SoundCloud, Spotify, or a direct audio file (.mp3, .wav). We'll show a preview when the link works.
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_PRICE_D: Set what students pay to access the quiz. You can adjust this anytime before publishing.
CREATE_MATERIAL.FIELD_TITLE_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. Spanish Listening Practice — Ordering Coffee
CREATE_MATERIAL.FIELD_TITLE_ERROR: Title must be at least 3 characters
CREATE_MATERIAL.FIELD_DESCRIPTION_PLACEHOLDER: What will students learn from this material?
CREATE_MATERIAL.FIELD_WHY_TAKE_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. Perfect if you struggle with verb conjugations — this quiz covers the 20 most common patterns.
CREATE_MATERIAL.FIELD_COVER_HINT: Makes your material stand out. You'll crop to the card shape (16:10). JPG or PNG, max 5 MB.
CREATE_MATERIAL.PRO_TIP_VIDEO: Mention Barnabi in your video to help students find your quiz and boost your visibility on the platform.
CREATE_MATERIAL.PRO_TIP_AUDIO: Mention Barnabi in your audio to help students find your quiz and boost your visibility on the platform.
CREATE_MATERIAL.FIELD_VIDEO_URL_PLACEHOLDER: Paste a YouTube or Vimeo link
CREATE_MATERIAL.FIELD_VIDEO_URL_ERROR: Enter a valid YouTube or Vimeo URL
CREATE_MATERIAL.FIELD_READING_PLACEHOLDER: Write or paste the reading passage here...
CREATE_MATERIAL.FIELD_AUDIO_URL_PLACEHOLDER: Paste a SoundCloud, Spotify, or direct audio link (.mp3, .wav)
CREATE_MATERIAL.FIELD_AUDIO_URL_ERROR: Supported: SoundCloud, Spotify, or direct audio files (.mp3, .wav). For YouTube/Vimeo, use Video Quiz.
CREATE_MATERIAL.FIELD_PRICE_HINT: Students view content for free, but pay to access the quiz
CREATE_MATERIAL.QUIZ_DESC: Add different question types to test comprehension
CREATE_MATERIAL.QUIZ_INST_1: Choose a question type and write your question
CREATE_MATERIAL.QUIZ_INST_2: Set the correct answer for each question
CREATE_MATERIAL.QUIZ_INST_3: Optionally add an explanation shown after the student answers
CREATE_MATERIAL.QUIZ_FILL_BLANK_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. The cat ___ on the mat (use ___ for the blank)
CREATE_MATERIAL.QUIZ_ORDERING_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. Put these words in the correct order
CREATE_MATERIAL.QUIZ_ITEMS_HINT: Drag to reorder — items will be shuffled for students
CREATE_MATERIAL.QUIZ_EMPTY: No questions yet. Choose a question type above to get started.
CREATE_MATERIAL.ATTEST_LABEL: I confirm that I own or have the rights to use all content in this material, including any linked videos, audio, and text.
CREATE_MATERIAL.TOAST_FILL_REQUIRED: Please fill in all required fields
CREATE_MATERIAL.TOAST_VALID_VIDEO: Please enter a valid video URL
CREATE_MATERIAL.TOAST_VALID_AUDIO: Please enter a valid audio URL
CREATE_MATERIAL.TOAST_Q_NEEDS_ANSWER: Question {{num}} needs at least one accepted answer
CREATE_MATERIAL.TOAST_Q_NEEDS_ITEMS: Question {{num}} needs at least 2 items to order
CREATE_MATERIAL.TOAST_Q_EMPTY_OPTION: Question {{num}} has an empty option — fill it in or remove it
CREATE_MATERIAL.TOAST_UPLOAD_FAILED: Failed to upload thumbnail. Try again.
CREATE_MATERIAL.TOAST_LINK_COPIED: Link copied! Share it with your students
CREATE_MATERIAL.TOAST_YT_URL_WARNING: YouTube channel URL saved, but could not resolve channel info. Check the URL or contact support.
CREATE_MATERIAL.TOAST_YT_LINK_FAILED: YouTube linking failed. Please try again.
CREATE_MATERIAL.TOAST_VIMEO_LINK_FAILED: Vimeo linking failed. Please try again.
CREATE_MATERIAL.ALERT_DELETE_MSG: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"?
CREATE_MATERIAL.ALERT_ARCHIVE_MSG: Are you sure you want to archive "{{title}}"? Students won't see it in search results.
CREATE_MATERIAL.ALERT_PUBLISH_MSG: Re-publish "{{title}}"? It will become visible to students again.
CREATE_MATERIAL.ALERT_UNLINK_YT_MSG: Are you sure you want to disconnect your YouTube channel?
CREATE_MATERIAL.ALERT_UNLINK_VIMEO_MSG: Are you sure you want to disconnect your Vimeo account?

SCHEDULE_CLASS.TYPE_TITLE: What would you like to schedule?
SCHEDULE_CLASS.TYPE_GROUP_DESC: Multiple students, pricing, and optional recurrence — great for recurring cohorts.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.TYPE_ONE_DESC: Book a private lesson with a single student from your roster.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.CHOOSE_STUDENT_DESC: Select a student you have taught before.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.NO_STUDENTS: No students found yet. Complete a lesson with a student to see them here.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.WIZARD_NAME_SUB: Choose a clear name students will recognize.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.WIZARD_DESCRIPTION_SUBLINE: Explain what students will learn or practice — a sentence or two is enough.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.WIZARD_LEVEL_SUB: Select the proficiency this class is designed for.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.WIZARD_PRICING_SUB: Use suggested pricing or set your own per-student price.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.WIZARD_MAX_STUDENTS_SUB: How many students can enroll in each session?
SCHEDULE_CLASS.WIZARD_MIN_STUDENTS_SUB: Fewest students needed for the class to run as scheduled.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.WIZARD_FLEXIBLE_MIN_SUB: Decide whether the class can run with fewer students than your minimum.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.WIZARD_INVITES_SUB: Optionally invite students you’ve taught before.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.WIZARD_SCHEDULE_SUB: Pick a slot from your availability.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.WIZARD_RECURRENCE_SUB: Choose how often this class meets.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.WIZARD_RECURRENCE_COUNT_SUB: How many times should this series run?
SCHEDULE_CLASS.WIZARD_VISIBILITY_SUB: Choose whether this class appears in public search.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.WIZARD_THUMBNAIL_SUB: Add a cover image for your class listing and calendar.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.WIZARD_THUMBNAIL_REQUIRED_HINT: A cover image is required for every class.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.WIZARD_THUMBNAIL_REQUIRED_TOAST: Please add a cover image before creating your class.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.HUB_ERROR: We couldn't load your classes. Check your connection and try again.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.HUB_EMPTY_ACTIVE_DESC: Create a group class to see it here. Students can join from invites or public listings.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.HUB_EMPTY_DRAFTS: No drafts yet. After you name a new class, use Save draft to keep your progress here.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.HUB_DRAFT_SUBLINE: Not scheduled yet — open to continue.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.HUB_DISCARD_DRAFT_MESSAGE: Delete "{{name}}"? This removes your saved progress.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.HUB_EDIT_LOAD_ERROR: We couldn't open this class for editing.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.HUB_DELETE_MESSAGE: Cancel "{{name}}"? Enrolled students will be notified.
SCHEDULE_CLASS.HUB_REMOVE_HISTORY_MESSAGE: Remove "{{name}}" from your list. This does not delete the class record or affect students.

EXPLORE_CLASSES.EMPTY_DESC: Create classes to share with your students or publicize them to the world.
EXPLORE_CLASSES.NO_MATCH_DESC: Try adjusting your filters to find more classes.
EXPLORE_CLASSES.TOAST_ALREADY_ENROLLED: You are already enrolled in this class
EXPLORE_CLASSES.TOAST_ENROLL_SOON: Direct enrollment for public classes will be available soon.

FORUM.EMPTY_SUBTITLE: Be the first to start a conversation. Questions, tips, and study wins are welcome.
FORUM.EMPTY_SUBTITLE_TUTOR: Only students can start threads here. When a student posts, you can reply with tips and answers—you won’t see new threads until someone starts one.
FORUM.EMPTY_SUBTITLE_FALLBACK: Community threads will show up here when they’re available.
FORUM.SIDEBAR_USERS_EMPTY: Leaderboard will appear as the community grows.
FORUM.SIDEBAR_TOPICS_EMPTY: Trending topics will show up here once threads are posted.

LESSONS_PAGE.EMPTY_STUDENT: You haven't had any lessons yet. Book one to get started!
LESSONS_PAGE.EMPTY_FILTERED: No lessons match your current filters.
LESSONS_PAGE.CARD_DESC_EMPTY: No analysis summary for this lesson yet.
LESSONS_PAGE.ANALYSIS_AVAILABLE_TAP: Lesson analysis is ready — tap to view your results.
LESSONS_PAGE.TUTOR_FEEDBACK_NEEDED: Student feedback is pending — tap to leave your notes.
LESSONS_PAGE.FIRST_LESSON_STUDENT: First lesson with {{name}} — share your goals and get started.
LESSONS_PAGE.FIRST_LESSON_TUTOR: First lesson with {{name}} — assess level and set expectations.
LESSONS_PAGE.FEEDBACK_BANNER_SUB_TUTOR: Tap this lesson to submit your notes — student is waiting.
LESSONS_PAGE.FEEDBACK_BANNER_SUB_STUDENT: Your tutor has not posted notes for this lesson yet. Tap for details.
LESSONS_PAGE.ALERT_REPORT_MESSAGE: Please select the issue you experienced:

TUTOR_CALENDAR.RESCHEDULE_DESC: Select a time that works for both you and your student
TUTOR_CALENDAR.COMPLETE_PROFILE_BEFORE_AVAILABILITY: You need to complete your profile setup before adding availability. This includes uploading your photo, video, credentials, and setting up a payout method.
TUTOR_CALENDAR.NO_EVENTS_DAY_DESC: You don't have any lessons or availability blocks for this day
TUTOR_CALENDAR.PROFILE_HIDDEN_UNTIL_COMPLETE: Your profile is hidden until complete
TUTOR_CALENDAR.DISABLE_OFFICE_HOURS_MSG: Students will no longer be able to instantly book sessions with you.
TUTOR_CALENDAR.TOAST_OFFICE_HOURS_UPDATE_FAILED: Failed to update office hours settings
TUTOR_CALENDAR.OFFICE_HOURS_WARNING:
Only enable this when you're ready to accept calls immediately!

When enabled:
• Students can join instantly
• You must respond within a minute
• You'll be taken to the Pre-Call Waiting Room
• You must stay on that page to remain available

You'll get a full-screen prompt when a student tries to join
TUTOR_CALENDAR.TOAST_OFFICE_HOURS_ENABLED: Office Hours enabled! Taking you to waiting room...
TUTOR_CALENDAR.CONFLICT_IN_EVENT: You're currently in a {{type}}. Please finish it before enabling office hours.
TUTOR_CALENDAR.CONFLICT_STARTING_SOON: You have a {{type}} starting in {{minutes}} minute(s). Please wait until after it ends.
TUTOR_CALENDAR.PROFILE_HIDDEN_MSG: You need to upload an introduction video before you can add availability. Your profile is currently hidden from students.
TUTOR_CALENDAR.PAYMENT_SETUP_MSG: You must complete payment setup before creating classes or setting availability. Please set up your payout method in the Profile tab.

LEGAL_PUBLIC.TERMS_S1_BODY:
By accessing or using Barnabi ("the Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms") and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, you may not use the Platform.

You must be at least 18 years old to create an account. If you are between 13 and 17 years old, you may only use the Platform with verified parental or guardian consent. Use by children under 13 is not permitted.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.TERMS_S2_BODY:
Barnabi is an online marketplace that connects independent language tutors ("Tutors") with language learners ("Students"). Barnabi facilitates bookings, payments, and video lessons but is not a party to the tutor–student relationship and does not employ, endorse, or guarantee the work of any Tutor.

Language lessons are provided by Tutors as independent contractors. The educational outcomes of any lesson are the result of the Tutor's effort and the Student's engagement, not a guarantee made by Barnabi.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.TERMS_S3_BODY:
You must provide accurate, current, and complete information when registering and keep it up to date. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account.

You must notify us immediately of any suspected unauthorised access. Barnabi is not liable for losses resulting from unauthorised use of your account where you have failed to keep your credentials secure.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.TERMS_S4_BODY:
Tutors create profiles that include their languages, qualifications, experience, rates, and availability. Barnabi does not independently verify all credentials listed on tutor profiles. Students are encouraged to review profiles, ratings, and written reviews before booking.

Barnabi reserves the right to remove or suspend any Tutor profile that contains false information or violates these Terms.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.TERMS_S5_BODY:
Lessons are booked and paid through the Platform. The lesson price is shown before you confirm a booking. Barnabi charges a service fee on each transaction, which is included in or added to the displayed price.

All payments are processed by Stripe, our third-party payment processor. By booking a lesson or purchasing credits, you authorise the applicable charge to your chosen payment method. Barnabi does not store full card numbers.

Credits purchased are stored in your Barnabi wallet and applied to future bookings. Credits are non-transferable and have no cash value except where required by law.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.TERMS_S6_BODY:
You may cancel a booked lesson before the cancellation deadline shown at checkout. Cancellations made in time are refunded as credits to your Barnabi wallet. Late cancellations or no-shows may result in a partial or no refund.

Tutors who cancel sessions without adequate notice may face credits issued to affected Students and possible account restrictions.

Refunds to your original payment method are processed only where required by applicable consumer protection law. Full details are available in the Help Centre.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.TERMS_S7_BODY:
Live lessons are conducted over video calls powered by Agora. You are responsible for having a compatible device, up-to-date browser, and sufficient internet connection. Barnabi is not liable for session interruptions caused by device, network, or third-party infrastructure issues.

Sessions are not recorded by Barnabi unless you explicitly activate a recording feature, and you must obtain consent from the other participant before recording.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.TERMS_S9_BODY:
The Barnabi name, logo, application design, and proprietary content are owned by Barnabi and protected by copyright and other intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without written permission.

Materials uploaded by Tutors (lesson plans, worksheets, audio clips, etc.) remain the intellectual property of the Tutor. By uploading materials to the Platform, Tutors grant Barnabi a limited, non-exclusive licence to display those materials to enrolled Students.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.TERMS_S10_BODY:
The Platform is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, express or implied, including but not limited to warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement.

Barnabi does not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free from viruses or other harmful components, nor that any specific educational outcomes will be achieved.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.TERMS_S11_BODY:
To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Barnabi's total cumulative liability to you for any claim arising from or relating to these Terms or the Platform shall not exceed the total fees you paid to Barnabi in the twelve (12) months immediately preceding the event giving rise to the claim.

Barnabi shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including loss of profits, data, or goodwill, even if advised of the possibility of such damages.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.TERMS_S12_BODY:
Barnabi may suspend or terminate your access to the Platform at any time, with or without notice, if you breach these Terms or engage in conduct that Barnabi reasonably considers harmful to the Platform or its users.

You may delete your account at any time from your profile settings. Upon deletion, your data is handled in accordance with our Privacy Policy. Any unused wallet credits forfeited upon voluntary account closure are non-refundable unless required by law.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.TERMS_S13_BODY: The Platform integrates third-party services including Stripe (payments), Agora (video), and Auth0 (authentication). Your use of those services is subject to their own terms and privacy policies. Barnabi is not responsible for the acts or omissions of third-party providers.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.TERMS_S14_BODY:
Barnabi may update these Terms from time to time to reflect changes in our services, legal requirements, or business practices. We will notify you of material changes by email or in-app notification at least 14 days before they take effect.

Continued use of the Platform after the effective date of revised Terms constitutes your acceptance of those changes. If you do not agree to the revised Terms, you must stop using the Platform and may delete your account.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.TERMS_S15_BODY:
These Terms are governed by applicable law. Any dispute arising out of or relating to these Terms or the Platform shall first be submitted to good-faith negotiation. If unresolved, disputes shall be subject to binding arbitration or the courts of the applicable jurisdiction, as permitted by law.

For questions about these Terms, contact us through in-app support or via the email address listed in your account settings.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.PRIVACY_S1_BODY:
Barnabi ("we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains what personal information we collect, why we collect it, how we use and share it, and the choices you have.

By using Barnabi, you agree to the collection and use of information as described in this Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use the Platform.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.PRIVACY_S2_BODY:
We collect the following categories of information:

• Account data — name, email address, profile photo, country, and language preferences when you register.
• Profile data — for Tutors: qualifications, teaching experience, spoken languages, hourly rate, introduction video, and bio. For Students: learning goals, current level, and native language.
• Lesson data — booking history, session start and end times, attendance, tutor and student ratings and written reviews.
• Payment data — transaction amounts, currency, and payment method details processed and stored by Stripe. We do not store full card numbers on our servers.
• Usage data — pages and features accessed, device type and operating system, browser type, IP address, and approximate location derived from IP.
• Communications — messages sent via in-app chat or to our support team.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.PRIVACY_S4_BODY:
We share your information only in the following circumstances:

• With Tutors you book — your name, profile photo, and learning goal are shared so the Tutor can prepare for your lesson.
• With Students who book you — Tutors' public profile information (name, photo, bio, rates, reviews) is visible to all users.
• With service providers — Stripe (payment processing), Agora (video infrastructure), Auth0 (authentication), and cloud hosting providers operate under data processing agreements and may only process your data on our behalf.
• For legal reasons — we may disclose data to comply with a legal obligation, court order, or to protect the rights and safety of Barnabi, our users, or the public.

We do not sell your personal data to third parties for advertising purposes.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.PRIVACY_S5_BODY:
We retain your account and lesson data for as long as your account is active. After account deletion we retain certain records for a reasonable period (typically up to 3 years) to resolve disputes, enforce our agreements, and comply with legal obligations.

Payment transaction records may be retained longer as required by financial regulations. You can request deletion of your personal data by contacting us; we will fulfil such requests to the extent permitted by law.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.PRIVACY_S6_BODY:
We implement industry-standard security measures including TLS encryption for data in transit and encryption at rest for sensitive data. Access to personal data is restricted to authorised personnel who need it to perform their job functions.

No security system is completely impenetrable. In the event of a data breach that is likely to affect your rights, we will notify you and relevant authorities as required by applicable law. Please use a strong, unique password and do not share your login credentials.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.PRIVACY_S8_BODY: Barnabi is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information without your consent, please contact us immediately and we will delete that information.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.PRIVACY_S10_BODY:
Barnabi operates globally. Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your own, including countries that may not provide the same level of data protection as your home jurisdiction.

Where we transfer data internationally, we put in place appropriate safeguards such as standard contractual clauses approved by relevant authorities to protect your information.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.PRIVACY_S11_BODY:
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we make material changes, we will notify you by email or via an in-app notice before the changes take effect.

The date at the top of this page reflects the most recent revision. Continued use of the Platform after a change takes effect constitutes your acceptance of the revised Policy.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.PRIVACY_S12_BODY:
If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, or wish to exercise your privacy rights, please contact us through in-app support or via the contact email listed in your account settings.

We aim to respond to all privacy-related enquiries within 30 days.
